title: feat: add Pruna p-image, p-image-edit, p-video models
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Fresh pixels from Pruna
gist.blurb: We just wired up Pruna's p-image, p-image-edit, and p-video models to the API. More ways to generate, tweak, and animate your ideas.
gist.summary: Integrated Pruna's image generation, image editing, and video models into the core API.
gist.impact: Developers can now access p-image, p-image-edit, and p-video models directly through the standard pollinations endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee holding a film clapperboard (representing video) and a paintbrush (representing image edit) next to the Monitor Robot, who is displaying a fresh image. Focus on the new media capabilities.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret and holding a film clapperboard. She hovers next to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head whose screen glows lime green (#ecf874) displaying a beautiful landscape. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
